metadata.recommended_grip: light side pinch, cap-base hold, or palm-supported label-forward grip
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Rotate slowly, control reflections, and frame the container so benefit cues come from packaging rather than fake usage claims.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid messy product smears unless the format requires it
avoid obscuring the label with fingers

metadata.recommended_grip: balanced side grip, underside support, or connector-end hold depending on device form
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Use measured product turns and stable grip transitions so ports, controls, and device function stay obvious without fake activation effects.

metadata.recommended_grip: light pinch at the edge or backing point with the decorative face visible
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Use macro-friendly framing and slow controlled turns to avoid glitter glare or lost detail.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid obscuring clasps or pin backs

metadata.recommended_grip: waistband hold, shoulder hold, hanger hold, or two-hand fabric spread
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Keep fabric stretched only enough to show construction and avoid deformation that changes perceived fit.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid cramped folds that hide cut details

metadata.recommended_grip: jar side hold, base support, or pack pinch with the front label visible
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Use appetizing but tidy tabletop framing without spills unless the product format clearly calls for it.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid messy spills without food styling context

metadata.recommended_grip: heel hold, strap hold, or under-sole support
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Use clean profile turns and avoid collapsing the upper or hiding the sole shape.

metadata.recommended_grip: two-hand corner lift, hem hold, or broad palm support
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Show textile thickness and drape with stable motions instead of abrupt shaking or bunched folds.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid cramped bunching that hides texture

metadata.recommended_grip: side carry grip, bottom support, or front-readable two-hand hold depending on pack size
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Show utility cues through clean orientation and grip clarity rather than dramatic motion or fake usage effects.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid upside-down handling that hides the label

metadata.recommended_grip: handle grip, rim support, or balanced two-hand support depending on tool weight
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Use stable tabletop or hand-held utility framing and avoid unsafe or misleading food-prep motions.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid implying food is included unless visible
avoid unstable tilts that hide function

metadata.recommended_grip: mid-body pinch or base support with the test window and branding visible
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Frame the device like a sealed or controlled-use product and keep the window, label, and cap visible.

metadata.recommended_grip: two-hand fabric spread, edge pinch, or neckline hold with clean drape control
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Show coverage, fall, and edge lines clearly while avoiding styling that distorts modestwear fit.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid twisting the fabric into unnatural tension
avoid cramped framing that hides silhouette cues

metadata.recommended_grip: base support, side pinch, or top-edge hold with the front face visible
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Favor clean beauty close-ups, keep the label and seal readable, and avoid spilling, crushing, or over-squeezing the product container.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid obscuring expiry or seal areas

metadata.recommended_grip: light side pinch, back support, or base hold depending on the display surface
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Use stable hero framing and slow turns that keep the object front-readable and intact.

metadata.recommended_grip: edge pinch, corner support, or back support with the printed face unobstructed
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Favor top-down or front-readable framing so the stationery format and design details stay clear.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid implying hidden contents that are not shown

metadata.recommended_grip: side grip with thumb behind label or base-supported bottle hold
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Avoid medical theatrics; frame the bottle like a trustworthy daily product with cap and label clearly visible.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid loose pills unless explicitly shown

metadata.recommended_grip: light side pinch, bottom support, or two-hand pack hold
metadata.camera_handling_notes: Favor cheerful, stable framing that shows the toy or craft contents cleanly and safely.
unsafe_handling_rules: avoid motion blur that hides parts

metadata.material_behavior: rigid or semi-flexible cosmetic container with cap resistance, squeeze response, or applicator control
metadata.surface_behavior: glossy or satin packaging with controlled highlights and readable branding surfaces

metadata.material_behavior: rigid electronic housing with weighted balance, hinge or button resistance, and cable or accessory articulation
metadata.surface_behavior: plastic, coated metal, or screen surfaces with clean edge highlights and visible control geometry

metadata.material_behavior: small rigid accessory with clasp, pin, or decorative hardware resistance
metadata.surface_behavior: metallic, enamel, or embellished surfaces with crisp highlights and visible ornament detail

metadata.material_behavior: woven or knit apparel textile with natural drape, fold recovery, and seam definition
metadata.surface_behavior: soft textile face with visible stitching, hems, and natural crease response

metadata.material_behavior: sealed food container or flexible food pack with realistic fill weight and closure response
metadata.surface_behavior: glossy labels, jar edges, or laminated packaging with appetizing but controlled reflections

metadata.material_behavior: structured footwear with flexible upper, shaped sole, and realistic bend at the forefoot
metadata.surface_behavior: matte or semi-gloss upper with visible strap, stitch, and sole-edge detail

metadata.material_behavior: soft woven textile with fold memory, drape, compression, and recovery
metadata.surface_behavior: textile face with weave, pile, or quilting detail and natural crease response

metadata.material_behavior: flexible pouch, rigid bottle, or lightweight boxed packaging with realistic carry weight and closure resistance
metadata.surface_behavior: plastic, paper, or laminated household packaging with readable front panels and closure details

metadata.material_behavior: rigid kitchenware in steel, plastic, or coated surfaces with realistic heft and handle balance
metadata.surface_behavior: semi-gloss to polished surfaces with visible edges, handles, lids, or working teeth

metadata.material_behavior: light rigid plastic device or kit component with cap-fit resistance and stable straight profile
metadata.surface_behavior: clean plastic body with readable test window or printed labeling

metadata.material_behavior: lightweight to medium-weight modestwear textile with soft fold memory, drape, and edge flutter
metadata.surface_behavior: matte or satin textile finish with visible seam, hem, and layering detail

metadata.material_behavior: tube, sachet, jar, or mask packaging with gentle squeeze response and stable lid or seal behavior
metadata.surface_behavior: clean cosmetic-grade packaging surfaces with satin or glossy reflections and visible seal edges

metadata.material_behavior: rigid decorative object in plastic, metal, resin, glass, or coated board with stable form
metadata.surface_behavior: printed, metallic, glossy, or matte decor surfaces with visible detail and edge highlights

metadata.material_behavior: paper, card, sticker, or notebook materials with light bend, page stack resistance, and crisp edge response
metadata.surface_behavior: matte or satin printed surfaces with visible cover, page, or label detail

metadata.material_behavior: rigid supplement bottle or canister with screw-cap resistance and audible closure expectation
metadata.surface_behavior: matte or satin bottle body with readable print and clean cap transitions

metadata.material_behavior: lightweight toy or craft packaging with flexible pack edges or small-part rigidity
metadata.surface_behavior: printed pack surfaces or tactile toy materials with visible color contrast and shape cues
